mapper.select: SELECT c.couponNo AS couponNo, c.couponType AS couponType, c.sellerUid AS sellerUid, s.companyName AS companyName, c.benefit AS benefit, c.issuedCnt AS issuedCnt, c.usedCnt AS usedCnt, c.status AS status, c.notice AS notice, c.name AS name, c.expireDate AS expireDate, c.startDate AS startDate, c.createdAt AS createdAt FROM coupon c JOIN seller s ON c.sellerUid = s.uid ORDER BY c.couponNo DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (couponType, sellerUid, benefit, issuedCnt, usedCnt, status, notice, name, expireDate, startDate) VALUES (#{couponType}, #{sellerUid}, #{benefit}, #{issuedCnt}, 0, 'ACTIVE', #{notice}, #{name}, #{expireDate}, #{startDate})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN seller s ON c.sellerUid = s.uid

SELECT c.couponNo AS couponNo, c.couponType AS couponType, c.sellerUid AS sellerUid, s.companyName AS companyName, c.benefit AS benefit, c.issuedCnt AS issuedCnt, c.usedCnt AS usedCnt, c.status AS status, c.notice AS notice, c.name AS name, c.expireDate AS expireDate, c.startDate AS startDate, c.createdAt AS createdAt FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN seller s ON c.sellerUid = s.uid ORDER BY c.couponNo DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
